name: 情感衝擊型（深情告白＋情慾暗示）
description: 全劇以太子打破佛門清規、向女主表白並暗示洞房收尾，將禁慾人設的崩塌作為最終的情感釋放。觀眾從開篇就期待的'禁慾太子動心'在此刻完全兌現，滿足感極強。結尾的輕鬆調情也沖淡了前面戰爭戲的沉重感。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Your highness, are you willing to break your vows for me and return to the secular life? ... You Minkx. Well, I'm going to devour you tonight. Still think you can run away?
